commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The protected-label PR has no narrow code defect for automation to repair; maintainers should review the compatibility proof gap and CI state.; Cleared: The diff touches Codex extension runtime/tests only, preserves fail-closed app exposure when inventory cannot verify readiness, and does not change supply-chain files. (sha=20ad6f60e20218352abd195a588577d7b62ab142)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Codex app-server plugin inventory, activation, app inventory cache, thread config refresh path, protocol typing, and focused tests so configured plugin-owned apps survive a missing local inventory and remote curated plugins use Codex remote IDs.

PR surface: Source +51, Tests +126. Total +177 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can miss remote-only curated plugin summaries and can keep plugin app exposure fail-closed when the OpenClaw process-local inventory is missing. I did not run a live repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The protected-label PR has no narrow code defect for automation to repair; maintainers should review the compatibility proof gap and CI state.
